caption: A man with a shaved head and a full dark beard is situated in a recording studio against a backdrop of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small logo on the left chest that reads "Sloppy Cinematic" above "VIDEO PROD". He is positioned behind a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man is engaged in a conversation, transitioning from a wide smile with his eyes open to a laugh where his eyes close. He leans slightly closer to the microphone as he speaks and laughs, with his facial expressions shifting from a smirk to a joyful, open-mouthed laugh. The lighting remains consistent across the scene, highlighting his features and the metallic surface of the recording equipment.
